response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI design fluency at scale — none of which are evidenced. No advanced degree, no public AI thought leadership, no large-scale cloud platform strategy work, and limited tenure in AI-focused roles. Better suited to a senior/staff full-stack engineering role than a Principal AI strategy position.
strengths: ~14 years of polyglot engineering across web, backend, mobile, and embedded with TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform (GISCollective) showing entrepreneurial initiative and Kubernetes deployment experience
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at the scale expected for a Principal-level AI strategy role
Lacks Director-level IC scope — no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping multi-org technical strategy, or external thought leadership in cloud/AI
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK in one prior role; no broad cloud-platform architecture or AI infrastructure depth

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI expertise vs. Principal AI strategy bar
Director-level IC scope and external influence
Strong engineering craftsmanship and recent agentic/MCP exposure
